betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Mh, part of the ritual that set off the Withers against me contains some aspect of the Meatball Man's magic.
It makes a surprising amount of sense. I understand this type of magic a whole lot more than sacred cinders, weirdly enough.
Maybe it has to do with the fact that I am a Gluttonous person myself?
This opens up new possibilities. The ritual did not work, I could not cleanse the influence of the Meatball man from Terra,but now this influence can be used, it can be traced. 
With this knowledge, I can follow theripples in the hungering recursive fields that follow the Lord of Gluttony; with this knowledge, I can track down the Meatball Man.
No longer a prey or a toy. With this knowledge, I can be the one to hunt him down.
Deep down, after my Ascension, I knew this will happen. A battle resumed.
The champion of Terra, and the Lord of Gluttony.
The fight must resume!
